ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2007 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the court orders case dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Joyce Long CSR# 8620. (212)

Off Calendar Jun-18-2007 Continued To Sep-17-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 9/17/2007 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Trina Ayala, CSR#12964. (212)
